homeHowItWorks.heading: How Dorixé works
homeHowItWorks.subheading: Dorixé connects you with trusted, independent cleaners — booked online and tailored to your home. One-time or recurring, we make it simple to keep your home clean, fresh, and stress-free.
homeHowItWorks.step1Desc: Choose your location, the cleaning service, and any preferences.
homeHowItWorks.step2Desc: Compare cleaners' hourly rates before you book — no hidden fees.
homeHowItWorks.step3Desc: Pick a date and time and pay safely through our platform.
homeHowItWorks.step4Desc: A verified, independent cleaner takes care of the rest.

homeEcoBand.heading: Our environmental impact
homeEcoBand.subheading: Every DORIXÉ booking makes the planet a little greener
homeEcoBand.footer: DORIXÉ offsets 100% of service-related transport emissions

homeJobPost.description: Describe your cleaning task, set your budget, and let verified eco-cleaners compete to win your booking — like Upwork, but for spotless homes.
homeJobPost.liveBidsLabel: Live bids on a deep-clean job · Amsterdam
homeJobPost.bid1Message: Available this Saturday with eco-friendly products. I bring all supplies!
homeJobPost.bid2Message: Friday morning available. 3 years deep-clean experience, zero-waste approach.
homeJobPost.bid3Message: Specialised in end-of-tenancy. Bringing all eco supplies, GDPR-compliant photos.

homeTestimonials.heading: Loved by households going green
homeTestimonials.subheading: Real reviews from verified DORIXÉ clients
homeTestimonials.review1Text: My flat has never been this clean. The cleaner used plant-based products that smelled amazing and didn't irritate my allergies. Booking was instant — I had confirmation in under 2 minutes.
homeTestimonials.review2Text: Used DORIXÉ for our office monthly clean. The eco-friendly team is professional, punctual, and the booking dashboard is a dream. Our whole company switched.
homeTestimonials.review3Text: Post-move deep clean was flawless. I used the bidding system and had 4 competitive offers within an hour. The eco-score transparency is a genuinely nice touch.

homeCta.badge: Join households switching to eco-friendly cleaning
homeCta.heading: Ready for a fresh, green home?
homeCta.description: Book your first eco-friendly clean today, or post a job and let verified professionals bid for your business.

sustainability.heroSubtitle: Every booking on DORIXÉ connects you with verified eco-conscious cleaners who use sustainable, plant-based products that are gentler on your home and the environment.
sustainability.levelBasicDesc: Uses some eco-friendly products. Getting started on their green journey.
sustainability.levelPremiumDesc: 100% eco product commitment. Full carbon footprint reporting.
sustainability.ctaSubtitle: Join households making the sustainable choice.

howItWorksPage.metaDescription: Book trusted eco-friendly cleaners in 3 simple steps.
howItWorksPage.heroSubtitle: Book trusted, eco-friendly cleaners in minutes. Or join as a cleaner and grow your eco-cleaning business.
howItWorksPage.customerStep1Desc: Enter your postcode or city. Browse verified eco-friendly cleaners sorted by rating and distance. Filter by service type, eco level, and availability.
howItWorksPage.customerStep2Desc: Select a time slot, add special instructions, and pay securely via card. Your payment is held in escrow — only released after the job is done.
howItWorksPage.customerStep3Desc: Your cleaner arrives at the scheduled time using plant-based, eco-friendly products. After completion, leave a review and help grow the green cleaning community.
howItWorksPage.providerStep1Desc: Create a cleaner account, submit your eco certifications, and complete identity verification. Approval takes 1–2 business days.
howItWorksPage.providerStep2Desc: Add your services, pricing, working hours, and service radius. Connect your Stripe account for weekly payouts.
howItWorksPage.providerStep3Desc: Browse job posts, submit bids, or receive direct bookings. Get paid weekly via bank transfer. DORIXÉ keeps only a small commission from each completed booking — for site maintenance and taxes — and the rest is yours.

becomeCleaner.heroSubtitle: Join DORIXÉ's network of verified eco-friendly cleaners. Set your own rates, choose your jobs, and get paid weekly.
becomeCleaner.perkRateBody: You set your own rate. DORIXÉ keeps only a small commission per completed booking — for site upkeep and taxes — and the rest is yours, paid weekly.
becomeCleaner.perkScheduleBody: Set your own availability, service area, and take only the bookings you want.
becomeCleaner.perkPayoutBody: Earnings are transferred to your bank every Monday via Stripe.
becomeCleaner.perkReputationBody: Every completed booking adds a verified review to your public profile.
becomeCleaner.perkEcoBody: DORIXÉ cleaners use plant-based, eco-friendly products.
becomeCleaner.perkDualBody: Already a client? Switch roles in one click — your Cleaner Account stays separate.
becomeCleaner.noRoleBody: Create your DORIXÉ account to join as a cleaner.
becomeCleaner.dualBody: Switch between Cleaner and Cleaner Account from the top navigation.
becomeCleaner.providerBody: Want to also post jobs and hire other cleaners? Enable your Cleaner Account with one click.
becomeCleaner.addAccountBody: Your existing account stays intact. Switch roles any time from the navbar.

about.heroSubtitle: DORIXÉ connects eco-conscious households with verified, eco-friendly cleaners who care as much about the planet as they do about a spotless home.
about.timelineProblemTitle: Finding a trustworthy eco-cleaner was nearly impossible
about.timelineProblemBody: Most cleaning platforms are packed with unlisted cleaners using chemical-heavy products. Clients who care about sustainability had no way to verify who was actually eco-friendly and who was just claiming to be.
about.timelineIdeaTitle: A marketplace that starts from eco, not retrofits it
about.timelineIdeaBody: We decided to build a platform where an eco-friendly approach is the entry requirement, not an optional badge. Every cleaner shares their green approach before they take a booking.
about.timelineSolutionBody: A full marketplace with identity-verified cleaners, escrow payments, a transparent bidding system, and automated weekly payouts. Built for households who want both quality and sustainability.
about.missionHeading: Make eco-friendly cleaning the default, not the exception
about.missionBody: Millions of homes are cleaned every week using products that are harsh on surfaces and damaging to waterways. We're changing that — one verified booking at a time. DORIXÉ makes it as easy to book an eco-friendly cleaner as it is to order a taxi.
about.valueEcoFirstBody: Every cleaner on DORIXÉ is asked about their use of plant-based, biodegradable, and eco-friendly products.
about.valueTrustedBody: All cleaners pass identity verification (Stripe Identity) and a manual approval review before their first booking. Your home, protected.
about.valuePricingBody: Cleaners set their own prices, and that's exactly what you pay — shown upfront. No fees added at checkout, no surprises.
about.valueQualityBody: Every completed booking unlocks a verified review. Ratings are real — only clients who booked and paid can leave feedback. Consistent quality or cleaners are removed.
about.valueFairBody: Cleaners set their own rates and keep the large majority of every booking. We take only a small commission to run the platform — no subscriptions, no hidden costs. The people doing the work are paid fairly.
about.valueEuropeBody: DORIXÉ is built for the EU and US — GDPR-compliant in Europe, payments in your local currency, local address formats, and cleaner onboarding that meets local regulations.
about.howSubtitle: Two ways to use the platform — for households and for cleaners.
about.customerPoint1: Search verified eco-friendly cleaners near you
about.customerPoint2: Book directly or post a job and receive competitive bids
about.customerPoint3: Pay securely — funds held in escrow until the job is done
about.customerPoint4: Leave a verified review after every booking
about.providerPoint1: Apply once — approval takes 1–2 business days
about.providerPoint2: Set your own prices and working hours
about.providerPoint3: Browse job posts and submit bids to grow your client base
about.providerPoint4: Set your own rate — weekly bank payouts
about.ctaHeading: Ready for a cleaner, greener home?
about.ctaBody: Join households switching to eco-friendly cleaning.

pricing.metaDescription: Transparent pricing. Clients pay the cleaner's rate — no fees added at checkout. Cleaners pay only a small commission per booking, with no subscriptions.
pricing.customerFeature2: Pre-authorised payment — only captured on completion
pricing.providerFeature3: Job alerts in your service area
pricing.heroSubtitle: Clients pay the cleaner's rate — nothing added at checkout. Cleaners pay only a small commission per completed booking. That's it.
pricing.customerPriceNote: You pay the cleaner's rate — nothing extra at checkout.
pricing.providerCardSubtitle: List your services and get booked
pricing.providerPriceNote: Just a small commission per completed booking — for site upkeep & taxes. No subscription.
pricing.faqChargedA: Your card is pre-authorised at booking. The charge is only captured when the cleaner marks the job complete — you never pay for a booking that didn't happen.
pricing.faqCancelA: Cancel more than 48 hours before → full refund. 24–48 hours → 50% refund. Under 24 hours → no refund. If the cleaner cancels, you always get a full refund.
pricing.faqPayoutA: Every Monday, Stripe automatically transfers the week's completed booking earnings to each cleaner's connected bank account.
pricing.faqMinimumQ: Is there a minimum booking value?
pricing.faqMinimumA: No. Cleaners set their own prices, and the small platform commission scales with the booking — there's no floor.
pricing.ctaSubtitle: Book your first eco-friendly cleaning or join as a cleaner — no commitment required.
pricing.faqContractQ: Is there a long-term contract or minimum term?
pricing.faqContractA: No. There's no long-term contract and no minimum term — book a one-off clean or a recurring schedule, and cancel or change anytime.
pricing.faqTasksQ: What's included in a standard clean?
pricing.faqTasksA: A standard clean typically covers dusting, vacuuming, mopping, and cleaning kitchens and bathrooms. You can add specific requests when you book.
pricing.providerExampleNote: You set your rate and keep the large majority of every booking. We take only a small commission per completed booking — for site maintenance and taxes. No subscription, no monthly fees, paid out weekly.

affiliate.metaDescription: Partner with DORIXÉ and earn 5% lifetime commission on every booking made by clients you refer. The eco-friendly way to grow your income.
affiliate.howStep1Body: Create a DORIXÉ account (or log in to your existing one). Your unique affiliate link is generated instantly — no approval, no waiting.
affiliate.howStep2Body: Post it on Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, your blog, or newsletter. Wherever your audience hangs out, your link works.
affiliate.howStep3Body: When someone clicks your link and books a cleaning, you earn 5% of the booking value — credited to your DORIXÉ account automatically.
affiliate.howStep4Title: Cash out or book with it
affiliate.howStep4Body: Use your credit balance to pay for your own cleanings or withdraw it. Your credit, your choice.
affiliate.benefit1Body: Every booking your referral makes — not just the first one — earns you 5%.
affiliate.benefit2Body: Track clicks, referrals, and earnings in your personal dashboard, updated live.
affiliate.benefit3Body: If someone clicks your link and books within 30 days, you get the credit.
affiliate.benefit4Body: Refer 5 people or 5,000. There's no monthly ceiling on what you can earn.
affiliate.benefit5Body: Commission lands in your credit wallet the moment a booking completes. No monthly payout delays.
affiliate.benefit6Body: Promote something you're proud of — a platform that's genuinely good for the planet.
affiliate.testimonial1Quote: I mentioned DORIXÉ once in my home-organisation video and earned €140 in the first week. The dashboard is so clean to track.
affiliate.testimonial2Quote: My eco-lifestyle newsletter recommended DORIXÉ last month. My readers loved it and I've already covered two months of my own cleanings.
affiliate.testimonial3Quote: Perfect for sustainability creators. The 5% lifetime model is genuinely rare — most programmes pay only on the first order.
affiliate.idealFor8: Anyone with an engaged, home-focused audience
affiliate.heroSubtitle: Partner with DORIXÉ and earn 5% lifetime commission on every booking made by clients you refer. No cap. No expiry. Just recurring credit for work you did once.
affiliate.howSubtitle: From sign-up to first commission in under 5 minutes.
affiliate.benefitsTitle: A programme built to reward loyal partners
affiliate.benefitsSubtitle: We designed our affiliate programme the way we'd want one ourselves — lifetime commissions, instant crediting, and a dashboard that actually shows you what's happening. No black boxes.
affiliate.idealForSubtitle: If your audience cares about their home, sustainability, or quality of life — DORIXÉ is the ideal fit.
affiliate.commissionBody: You earn {pct}% of each booking's subtotal (the cleaner's price, before the platform fee). There's no cap per booking, no cap per month, and no expiry. If someone you referred books twice a week for years, you earn on every single one of those bookings.
affiliate.ctaTitleSignedOut: Start earning today. No approval needed.
affiliate.ctaSubtitleSignedIn: Share your unique link and earn 5% on every booking your referrals make — forever.
affiliate.ctaSubtitleSignedOut: Sign up, grab your link, and share. Your first commission could arrive before the week is out.
affiliate.ctaTerms: By joining, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms>. Commission paid as platform credit.

compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.title: Identity verification
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.description: DORIXÉ requires all cleaners to verify their identity via Stripe. This ensures client safety and enables payouts to your bank account.
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.needId: • A government-issued ID (passport, national ID, or driver's licence)
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.needSelfie: • A selfie / photo taken during verification
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.needProcess: • The process takes 2–3 minutes and is handled securely by Stripe
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.skipButton: Skip for now — I'll do this later
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.footerNote: You can continue without verifying, but you won't be approved until identity verification is complete.
compOnboardingProviderIdentityStep.errorStartVerification: Could not start identity verification. Please try again.

compOnboardingProviderPayoutStep.successDescription: Your payout account is set up. You'll receive your earnings weekly every Monday.
compOnboardingProviderPayoutStep.title: Set up payouts
compOnboardingProviderPayoutStep.description: Connect your bank account via Stripe to receive weekly payouts. DORIXÉ keeps a small commission per completed booking for site maintenance and taxes; the rest is paid to you.
compOnboardingProviderPayoutStep.benefitTransparency: Full earnings transparency in your dashboard
compOnboardingProviderPayoutStep.connectError: Could not start Stripe Connect. Please try again.
compOnboardingProviderPayoutStep.footnote: You can connect Stripe later from your dashboard. Payouts require a connected account.

compProviderProviderDashboardBids.emptyDescription: Browse open jobs and submit your first bid.
compProviderProviderDashboardBids.title: Your Bids
compProviderProviderDashboardBids.acceptedNotice: {count, plural, one {# bid accepted} other {# bids accepted}} — check your schedule above

compProviderProviderDashboardDisputes.emptyDescription: A clean dispute record builds trust with clients.
compProviderProviderDashboardDisputes.title: Dispute History

compProviderProviderDashboardEarnings.title: Earnings
compProviderProviderDashboardEarnings.emptyPayouts: No payouts yet — first payout runs after your first completed job.

compProviderProviderDashboardNearbyJobs.setLocationDescription: Add your address to your profile so we can show you jobs near you.
compProviderProviderDashboardNearbyJobs.noJobsTitle: No open jobs near you right now
compProviderProviderDashboardNearbyJobs.noJobsDescription: New jobs are posted daily — check back soon.

compProviderProviderDashboardNotificatio.emptyDescription: New job alerts and updates will appear here.
compProviderProviderDashboardNotificatio.heading: Notifications

compProviderProviderDashboardRating.title: Your Rating
compProviderProviderDashboardRating.emptyDescription: Your ratings from completed jobs will appear here.

compProviderProviderDashboardSchedule.emptyDescription: New bookings from clients will appear here.
compProviderProviderDashboardSchedule.heading: Upcoming Schedule

compReferralReferralCard.title: Referral Programme
compReferralReferralCard.subtitle: Earn 5% on every booking your referrals make
compReferralReferralCard.step1: Share your link — anyone who signs up via it is tagged as your referral
compReferralReferralCard.step2: They complete their first booking — your referral becomes active
compReferralReferralCard.step3: You earn 5% of every booking they make, forever, as platform credit
compReferralReferralCard.step4: Use your credit balance as a discount on your next booking

compUiLanguagePopup.comingSoon: DORIXÉ is currently in English. <highlight>{language}</highlight> support is coming soon.

compReviewsRateCustomer.heading: Rate this client
compReviewsRateCustomer.subtitle: Share your experience working with them.
compReviewsRateCustomer.thanks: Thanks — your review has been saved.

compProviderPricing.title: Your pricing
compProviderPricing.description: Set your hourly rate (or per-job price) for each service you offer — clients book and pay based on these rates.
compProviderPricing.empty: You haven't set any prices yet. Clients can't book you until you add at least one service with a rate.

homeWhatsIncluded.heading: What's included
homeWhatsIncluded.subheading: Everything for a fresh, healthy home — with eco-friendly options and flexible scheduling.
homeWhatsIncluded.item1: General cleaning of living areas, kitchen, and bathroom
homeWhatsIncluded.item3: Extra services like deep cleaning, window cleaning, and move-in / move-out
homeWhatsIncluded.item4: Eco preferences — plant-based products, plastic-free, and fragrance-free options
homeWhatsIncluded.item5: One-time or recurring bookings — weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly

homeWhyChoose.heading: Why choose Dorixé
homeWhyChoose.subheading: Quality cleaning you can trust, with the flexibility and transparency you deserve.
homeWhyChoose.reason2Desc: See each cleaner's hourly rate before you book — no hidden fees.
homeWhyChoose.reason3Desc: One-time or recurring — weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly.
homeWhyChoose.reason4Desc: Pay safely online through our platform — no cash required.
homeWhyChoose.reason5Desc: Sustainable products and practices — better for your home and the planet.
homeWhyChoose.trustNote: Pricing reflects the service, how long it takes, and each cleaner's hourly rate — all shown upfront. Payments are handled securely online, and after every clean you can leave a review to help keep quality high.

compProviderAddons.title: Add-ons
compProviderAddons.subtitle: Optional paid extras clients can add to a booking (e.g. oven cleaning, ironing).
compProviderAddons.invalid: Enter a name and a price of at least €0.50.

approvalNotice.pendingTitle: Your cleaner account isn't active yet
approvalNotice.pendingBody: Approval is automatic — just complete your cleaner profile (business name, a short bio of at least 20 characters, city and postcode) and you'll be approved right away.
approvalNotice.suspendedBody: Your cleaner account has been suspended by an administrator. Please contact support to resolve this.

ecoStore.metaDescription: Eco-friendly cleaning products, supplies and business starter kits, recommended by DORIXÉ.
ecoStore.title: Eco-store
ecoStore.subtitle: Tools, supplies and starter kits we recommend for a greener clean.
ecoStore.disclosure: Some links are affiliate links — we may earn a commission when you buy through them, at no extra cost to you.
ecoStore.starterPacksSubtitle: Everything you need to launch your cleaning business.
ecoStore.emptyBody: We're curating our first recommendations — check back soon.

providerStatisticsPage.heading: Your statistics
providerStatisticsPage.subheading: Your performance and reliability at a glance.
providerStatisticsPage.reliabilityExplainer: Your reliability score combines your average rating with how reliably you complete the jobs you accept.

providerCalendarPage.heading: Calendar
providerCalendarPage.subheading: All your bookings in one place.

providerMessagesPage.heading: Messages

customerMessagesPage.emptyDescription: When you message a cleaner about a booking, it will show up here.

customerPaymentMethods.title: Payment methods
customerPaymentMethods.subtitle: Save a card for faster checkout and recurring bookings.
customerPaymentMethods.error: Could not save the card. Please try again.

accountData.title: Your data
accountData.subtitle: Download a copy of your data, or delete your account.
accountData.deleteNote: This permanently deletes your account and signs you out. Some records may be kept where the law requires.
accountData.deleteConfirm: Delete your account? This cannot be undone.
accountData.deleteError: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

contactPage.title: Help & support
contactPage.subtitle: Have a question or a problem? Send us a message and we will reply by email.
contactPage.successBody: Thanks — we will get back to you by email.
